description: Ontology for extracting structured retail offer data from promotional flyers and catalogues. Each extraction job produces exactly one Supplier, zero-or-more Categories, and zero-or-more Items.

Supplier.description: A retail store or brand that publishes the promotional flyer. Exactly one Supplier is produced per extraction job.

id.description: Unique document key; defaults to supplier_id when not set explicitly.

supplier_id.description: Stable business identifier for the supplier, e.g. 'aldi-de-001'. Provided as input to the job; do not infer from images.

brand.description: Retail brand name as printed on the flyer, e.g. 'ALDI SÜD', 'Lidl', 'REWE', 'Edeka'.

store_name.description: Full store or chain name. Use the brand name if a specific store name is not visible.

address.description: Physical address. Use empty strings for fields that cannot be extracted.

opening_hours.description: Weekly opening hours if printed on the flyer.

region.description: Geographic region or market area shown on the flyer, e.g. 'Bayern', 'Nordrhein-Westfalen', 'Österreich'.

offer_validity.description: Date range for which the promotional prices are valid. Use ISO 8601 datetime strings (e.g. '2024-01-15T00:00:00Z').

ingestion_metadata.description: Set automatically by the processor; do not include in LLM output.

OpeningHour.description: Opening hours for a single day or day-range.

OfferValidity.description: Promotional validity window for all items in the flyer.

IngestionMetadata.description: Technical provenance metadata — set by the processor, never by the LLM.

Category.description: A normalized product category. Shared across suppliers; models a semantic grouping independent of any single flyer layout.

id.description: Unique document key; defaults to category_id when not set.

category_id.description: Stable slug-style identifier, lowercase, hyphen-separated, e.g. 'dairy-products', 'fresh-produce', 'beverages-alcoholic'.

name.description: Human-readable category name in the flyer language, e.g. 'Molkereiprodukte', 'Obst & Gemüse'.

parent_category_id.description: category_id of the parent category if this is a subcategory, e.g. 'beverages-alcoholic' → parent 'beverages'.

description_text.description: One- or two-sentence description of the category and what kinds of products belong to it.

semantic_tags.description: List of searchable keywords associated with this category, e.g. ['milk', 'cheese', 'yogurt', 'butter'].

Item.description: A concrete promotional offer for a product within the flyer. One Item per distinct SKU or deal shown on the flyer.

id.description: Unique document key; defaults to item_id when not set.

item_id.description: Stable identifier for this offer, e.g. '{supplier_id}-{slug}-{page}'. Must be unique within the job.

supplier_id.description: Matches the Supplier.supplier_id for this job. Always the same value across all Items in one job.

name.description: Product name as printed on the flyer.

brand.description: Product brand (not the retailer brand), e.g. 'Coca-Cola', 'Milka'. Omit or null if own-brand.

description_text.description: Brief product description including key attributes, e.g. 'Vollmilch 3.5% Fett, 1L Tetrapack'.

category_id.description: Must match a Category.category_id present in the 'categories' array.

packaging.description: Pack size, unit type, and packaging format.

pricing.description: All pricing information for this offer.

Attributes.description: Optional quality and provenance attributes for a product.

origin.description: Country or region of origin, e.g. 'Deutschland', 'Spanien'.

quality_grade.description: Quality or certification grade, e.g. 'Bio', 'Premium', 'Klasse I'.

bio.description: True if the product carries an organic/bio certification.

animal_welfare.description: Animal welfare label if applicable, e.g. '4-Sterne Tierhaltung', 'Weidehaltung'.

quantity.description: Numeric quantity in the stated unit.

Pricing.description: Pricing details for a promotional offer.

original_price.description: Regular price before the promotion, if shown (Streichpreis).

discount_percentage.description: Percentage discount, e.g. 20.0 for 20% off. Compute if not printed but original_price is available.

unit_price.description: Normalised unit price, e.g. price per kg or per litre.

unit_reference.description: Reference unit for unit_price, e.g. '1 kg', '100 ml'.

bonus_amount.description: Bonus cash value or loyalty-point value if applicable.

coupon_required.description: True if a coupon or app activation is required to claim the discount.

deposit.description: Deposit (Pfand) amount if applicable, e.g. 0.25 for Einwegpfand.

availability.description: Availability note, e.g. 'Nur solange der Vorrat reicht', 'Ab Donnerstag'.
